description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent front porch supported by white columns and a balcony running the length of the upper floor. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray tones, with large, evenly spaced windows on both levels. The property includes a paved driveway with a parked car, two palm trees at the front, and a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella. The landscaping is minimal, with a few additional trees placed around the perimeter. The roof is a simple, low-pitched gable style, and the overall design emphasizes symmetry and clean lines. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with a focus on modern suburban aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a front porch, balcony, large windows, and a backyard pool area. The property features a paved driveway, palm trees, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with porch, balcony, driveway, car, and two palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and the symmetrical window arrangement on both floors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, lounge area, umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and the rear landscaping with trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, white columns, balcony above, and paved steps leading to the entrance.
